text: TEHRAN AIR DEFENSES: Multiple air defense activations heard across Tehran's western, central, and southeastern districts for ~20 minutes. Tasnim/Fars say military engaging 'small aircraft and reconnaissance drones.' No attribution confirmed. Israel not commenting. Situation returned to normal.
verificationNote: Newsmax, Arab News, Times of Israel liveblog all confirmed Tehran air defense activation May 1 evening.

text: CNN INVESTIGATION: At least 16 American military sites in 8 Middle Eastern countries 'destroyed and unusable' from Iranian strikes. Al-Udeid (Qatar) aviation control center hit twice. E-3 Sentry AWACS specifically targeted. Critical radar/comms beyond repair. This represents majority of US positions in region.
verificationNote: CNN exclusive investigation with satellite imagery. Corroborates earlier NBC News reporting on base damage across 7 countries.

text: GERMANY WITHDRAWAL: Pentagon formally orders 5,000 US troops withdrawn from Germany over 6-12 months. Hegseth signed the order. Direct retaliation for Chancellor Merz calling Iran 'humiliating' the US. Major NATO rift deepening over the war.
verificationNote: Breaking Defense, Washington Post confirmed withdrawal order signed by Hegseth.

text: FIBER-OPTIC DRONE THREAT: Hezbollah's fiber-optic guided FPV drones now a daily occurrence. 27+ attacks since February. IDF confirms no effective countermeasure — drones invisible to radar and EW. Cable costs ~$30/km, launches from 15km. 16+ IDF killed by drones since March.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, NBC News, Washington Post, Press TV all confirmed fiber-optic drone campaign details.

text: WAR POWERS ANALYSIS: Trump simultaneously declares hostilities 'terminated' (War Powers letter) and calls it 'treasonous' to say US isn't winning the war. Hegseth argues WPR clock 'pauses' during ceasefire — legal experts unanimously reject this. Collins first GOP crossover. Murkowski threatens AUMF.
verificationNote: PBS, NPR, Axios, Time, Democracy Now confirmed War Powers developments. Brennan Center's Ebright rejected Hegseth's legal argument.

text: OIL MARKET: Brent $108.10 (+35.4%), WTI $101.05 (+33.8%). Oil down from $126 wartime high — holding near week lows on Iran peace proposal. AAA gas $4.39 at wartime high. Iran crude exports collapsed to 567K bpd. CENTCOM 44 vessels turned. Exxon: 'market hasn't seen full impact yet.'
verificationNote: TradingEconomics, CNBC, AAA confirmed price data. CNBC confirmed Exxon CEO warning.

text: DAY 64 ROUNDUP: Trump 'treasonous' remark at Florida rally. Pentagon 5K troops out of Germany. Tehran air defenses activated vs drones. CNN: 16 US bases damaged/unusable. Habboush airstrike kills 6-8. Kfar Rumman: 5 bodies recovered. Sgt. Ben Hamo (19) killed by Hezbollah drone. Brent $108. Gas $4.39. Hormuz Day 61.
verificationNote: CNN, Breaking Defense, Newsmax, WaPo, CBC, Times of Israel, CNBC, AAA — all cross-verified.
